SystemUser.title: SystemUser
SystemUser.description: Represents a user with system access, identified by a username and a linked UID.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an individual employee within the system, storing their core details and default payment information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Employee entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the employee.

defaultDailyRate.description: The employee's default daily rate, which can be 'Varies' or a specific value.

paymentMethod.description: The preferred payment method for the employee, e.g., 'Direct Deposit'.

RouteTrackerRow.title: RouteTrackerRow
RouteTrackerRow.description: Represents a single entry from the route tracker, detailing a specific route's activity for payroll calculation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RouteTrackerRow entity.

date.description: The date of the route activity.

client.description: The client associated with this route activity.

miles.description: The total miles driven for this route.

stops.description: The total number of stops made for this route.

driverId.description: Reference to the Employee who served as the driver for this route. (Relationship: Employee 1:N RouteTrackerRow)

helperId.description: Reference to the Employee who served as the helper for this route. Can be null if no helper. (Relationship: Employee 1:N RouteTrackerRow)

actualPayAudit.description: Optional audit field for actual pay related to this route.

deltaAudit.description: Optional audit field for pay delta related to this route.

PayrollRun.title: PayrollRun
PayrollRun.description: Defines a complete payroll period, including its start and end dates, pay date, and current status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PayrollRun entity.

payPeriodStart.description: The starting date of the pay period.

payPeriodEnd.description: The ending date of the pay period.

payDate.description: The date when employees are paid for this period.

status.description: The current status of the payroll run.

PayrollItem.title: PayrollItem
PayrollItem.description: Represents a single employee's paystub details for a specific payroll run, including earnings and deductions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PayrollItem entity.

payrollRunId.description: Reference to the PayrollRun this item belongs to. (Relationship: PayrollRun 1:N PayrollItem)

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee this payroll item is for. (Relationship: Employee 1:N PayrollItem)

employeeNameSnapshot.description: A snapshot of the employee's name at the time of payroll run, for historical accuracy.

dailyRateSnapshot.description: A snapshot of the employee's daily rate at the time of payroll run, for historical accuracy.

notes.description: General notes or special instructions for this employee's payroll item.

earningsLines.description: A list of automatically generated earnings lines based on route tracker data.

otherEarningsLines.description: A list of manually added or modified other earnings for the employee.

deductionsLines.description: A list of deductions applied to the employee's pay.

definition.description: Stores access nodes for users. Linked by UID.
Stores core HR details for staff.
